text: The board may employ and compensate persons to carry out the powers and duties of the district.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 5
### Chapter 173. Intermunicipal Commuter Rail Districts
##### § 173.109 — Employees

The board may employ and compensate persons to carry out the powers and duties of the district.

*Added by Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 85 (S.B.1540), Sec. 2.04, eff. April 1, 2011.*

subsections.text: The board may employ and compensate persons to carry out the powers and duties of the district.

history.raw: Added by Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 85 (S.B.1540), Sec. 2.04, eff. April 1, 2011.
